description: Reference lifecycle hook definitions for ECC memory persistence. The production hook graph is hooks/hooks.json.

events.purpose: Load bounded prior context and detect project state at session start.
Persist session state before context compaction.
Record tool intent for continuous learning signals.
Record tool results for continuous learning signals.
Record per-session tool calls and file activity for ECC2 metrics.
Persist session-end summaries when transcript metadata is available.
